steps.title: Identify the final sentence's claim
steps.content:
The final sentence states: “This route reveals the multinational dimensions of the trade networks.” It makes a claim about the significance of the discovery (the fish bones found in San Jose).

The underlined sentence must provide the information that supports this claim about what the discovery reveals.

steps.title: Match the supporting information
steps.content:
The underlined sentence provides specific information about the trade route—Jinshanzhuang's coordination, the source locations (Vietnamese and Malaysian fisheries), the destination (North America)—that demonstrates the multinational nature of the networks and thus supports the final sentence's claim about the discovery's significance.

The other choices either mischaracterize the underlined sentence's content (A suggests it explains why origins remain inconclusive when it provides specific origin information; C treats it as describing excavation methods when it describes historical trade) or misread its relationship to the final sentence (D claims the final sentence casts doubt on what it presents when it actually affirms it).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
